ddls:
CREATE TABLE "storage_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storage account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the storage account */,
  "resource_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource group the account belongs to */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription the account belongs to */,
  "management_policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the management policy applied to the account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the storage account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the storage account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the storage account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "storage_size" INTEGER /* Total storage size allocated to the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storage_accounts_management_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("management_policy_id") REFERENCES management_policies ("management_policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storage_accounts_resource_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_group_id") REFERENCES resource_groups ("resource_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storage_accounts_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_groups" (
  "resource_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource group */,
  "resource_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource group */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription the group belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the resource group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the resource group was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the resource group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "subscription_name" TEXT /* Name of the subscription */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., enterprise, individual) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the subscription was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the subscription was last updated */,
  "billing_cycle" TEXT /* Billing cycle for the subscription (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "billing_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription is billed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "management_policies" (
  "management_policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each management policy */,
  "management_policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the management policy */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of policy (e.g., security, compliance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the management policy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the management policy was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the management policy */,
  "policy_category" TEXT /* Category of the management policy (e.g., security, compliance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("management_policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy rule */,
  "management_policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the management policy the rule belongs to */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the policy rule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the policy rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the policy rule was last updated */,
  "rule_condition" TEXT /* Condition for the policy rule (e.g., IP address, user role) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_rules_management_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("management_policy_id") REFERENCES management_policies ("management_policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storage_account_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storage account the activity belongs to */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "activity_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storage_account_activity_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES storage_accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storage_account_activity_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storage account the access belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the account */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES storage_accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storage account the audit belongs to */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit (e.g., security, compliance) */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date the audit occurred */,
  "audit_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the audit */,
  "audit_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_audit_by FOREIGN KEY ("audit_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES storage_accounts ("account_id")
)
